Create one seamless square tileable pixel-art material texture for: terracotta abbey roof tile albedo, repeating rounded staggered courses, orange clay, dark pixel gaps, worn light ridge caps like the reference roofs.

Style target from the reference: warm saturated storybook pixel-art isometric abbey diorama, readable chunky outlines, limited ramps, crisp nearest-neighbor pixels. Albedo texture only; no baked scene lighting.

The entire image must be the flat material pattern edge-to-edge. It must be usable as an Image Texture in Blender.

Hard constraints: no text, no letters, no numbers, no prompt sheet, no labels, no watermark, no UI, no border, no checkerboard, no white page, no isolated object, no person, no portrait, no scene, no perspective camera, no terrain patch. Return only the texture image.
